task.title: Adding a preprocessor to a property group
task.shortdesc: You can define a local, site-developed preprocessor and add it to a property group.

keywords.indexterm: adding multiple preprocessors to a property group

taskbody.prereq: You must define a property group on a local or remote system.

steps.stepsection: To add a preprocessor to a property group:

step.cmd: Open a property group in the property group editor.
Open the Local Preprocessors page of Local COBOL Settings or Local PLI Settings.
In the Preprocessors section, click New.
step.stepresult: The fields in the Preprocessor Options section are cleared.

step.info: See the context-sensitive help for a detailed description of the fields.

step.cmd: Click Ctrl+S to save your changes or New to add another preprocessor to the list.
